title: Rebuild Shot 006 Clean Fee Explanation
reason: The core gag works, but the paper and background keep generating pseudo-text, icons and infographics.
instruction: Regenerate the shot with Falk holding the paper angled away or showing the back side only. The gag must come from Falk's face and Rico's confusion, not from text on paper.
must_have: Rico confused and trying to calculate
paper visible only as blank back side or edge
no icons, arrows, symbols or fake writing

title: Rebuild Shot 009 Sami Punchline
reason: Sami must read as deadpan Späti oracle, not a dark crime figure.
instruction: Regenerate Sami in the doorway with beanie, hoodie, cheap blank coffee cup and tired half-closed eyes. Keep him dry, calm and non-threatening.
must_have: Falk half leaving with same outfit

title: Create Shot 007 Kralle Judgment
reason: Shot is still queued and needed to land the cat punchline.
instruction: Create Kralle on the crooked window ledge like a Kiez judge while Rico counts coins and Falk protects the blank paper.

title: Create Shot 008 Payment Beat
reason: Shot is queued and needed before Sami enters.
instruction: Create Rico handing over money with a lost face while Falk accepts it gently like he is doing a favor.

title: Create Shot 010 Final Rico Reaction
reason: Shot is queued and needed for the emotional aftertaste after Sami's line.
instruction: Create a quiet close-up of Rico's blank lost eyes with Kralle calm behind him. Keep it still and awkward.

title: Create Shot 011 End Pullback
reason: Final wide shot is queued and needed to close the episode with TV feeling.
instruction: Create a clean wide pullback keyframe where Rico sits small again and the room visually swallows him. No title card text.
